title: Resetting Xbox
author: dijksterhuis
aiHeadline: Xbox Reset Guide: Because who doesn't love spending an hour re-downloading the same update they just installed?

title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
author: peter_d_sherman
aiHeadline: OpenWrt One: Because who needs a router that just works when you can spend hours tweaking configs and still end up with slower speeds?

title: Real-time map of Great Britain's rail network
author: scrlk
aiHeadline: Real-time Rail Map of Great Britain: Now you can watch your train disappear into the void in real-time, just like always!

title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
author: basilikum
aiHeadline: CoMaps: Finally, a map app that doesn't track you... because it's offline and probably doesn't know where you are anyway!

title: Nintendo announces new product revisions in Europe with replaceable batteries
author: akyuu
aiHeadline: Nintendo Switch Gets Replaceable Batteries: Now you can finally upgrade your battery life by spending $20 on a new one every 6 months!
